title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 313.802 - Law not applicable to lottery, bingo or pari-mutuel wagering
text:
313.802.  Law not applicable to lottery, bingo or pari-mutuel wagering. — Sections 313.800 to 313.840 do not apply to the state lottery, bingo, or to the pari-mutuel system of wagering used or intended to be used pursuant to this chapter.
(L. 1991 H.B. 149 § 2 Adopted by Referendum, Proposition A, November 3, 1992)
